caption: A man with a tall, pointed silver wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting, appearing to record a podcast. He wears a white button-down shirt paired with a red and white patterned bowtie and light-colored suspenders. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, the wall is decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. The logo "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears in the lower left and lower center of the scene. Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth open in the first frame and closing gradually by the final frame.
